title: Software Engineer
description: Builds reliable software products, collaborates with cross-functional teams, and solves complex technical problems from design to deployment.

title: Data Scientist
description: Uses statistics, machine learning, and experimentation to extract insights from data and support evidence-based business decisions.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Automates infrastructure, improves release pipelines, and ensures systems are scalable, secure, and stable across environments.

title: UX Designer
description: Researches user behavior and designs intuitive experiences and interfaces that improve usability, engagement, and customer satisfaction.

title: Startup Founder (Tech)
description: Identifies market opportunities, builds product vision, leads teams, and drives growth for a technology-focused startup venture.
